description_long: This rifle features a robust metallic body with a rectangular receiver and a prominent, boxy ammunition feed on the right side. The weapon is equipped with a fixed wooden stock and a matching wooden pistol grip, providing stability and ergonomic handling. A visible belt of ammunition feeds into the receiver, suggesting it is a belt-fed, likely automatic weapon. The barrel is long and cylindrical, extending from the receiver with a simple, unadorned muzzle. There is a bipod mounted beneath the barrel for support during sustained fire. The overall finish is utilitarian, with a matte metallic sheen and visible wear, indicating heavy use.
description: A belt-fed, automatic rifle with a metallic body, wooden stock and grip, and a boxy side-mounted ammunition feed. Features a long barrel, bipod, and a utilitarian, worn finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, wooden stock and grip, and the belt-fed ammunition system.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel, bipod, and the protruding ammunition box on the right side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the belt of ammunition feeding into the receiver and the wooden stock.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the wooden stock and grip, with the ammunition box and belt visible to the left.
